title: PageHeader
description: Page header with title, subtitle, optional back button, breadcrumbs, tabs and an actions area.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Title, subtitle and divider — the most common combination.

breadcrumbs.title: With breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs.desc: Use the breadcrumbs slot to show the navigation hierarchy.

tabs.title: With tabs
tabs.desc: Tabs align with the divider for a smooth visual transition.

actions.title: With back & actions
actions.desc: Typical combo for detail or edit views.

props.title: Main page title.
props.subtitle: Secondary text below the title.
props.backButton: Shows a back button to the left of the title.
props.backIcon: Back button icon. Defaults to chevron-left.
props.backAriaLabel: Accessible name for the icon-only back button.
props.divider: Renders a bottom border separating the header from content.
props.sticky: Enables position: sticky at the top of scroll.

slots.title: Replaces the plain title with rich content.
slots.subtitle: Replaces the plain subtitle with rich content.
slots.actions: Actions on the right side of the header (buttons, menus).
slots.hero: Highlighted area (banner, metrics) below the main header.
slots.tabs: Tabs rendered below the header, aligned with the divider.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the page header
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by interactive elements inside the header (back button, actions)
